zh.Beswick, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke於1375年出生。他和Mary Beardsall至少有1個兒子。他去世於1400年享年25歲。

zh-hans.Beswick, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾貝斯維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke于1375年出生。他和Mary Beardsall至少有1个儿子。他去世于1400年享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke was born in 1375. He had at least 1 son with Mary Beardsall. He died in 1400, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke est né en 1375. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mary Beardsall. Il est décédé en 1400, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke wurde 1375 geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Beardsall mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 25 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke è nato il nel 1375. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mary Beardsall. Morì nel 1400, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.Beswick, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアベスウィック
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Biswickeは1375年に生まれた。彼はMary Beardsallとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1400年に25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke(은)는 1375년 태어났다. 그는 Mary Beardsall(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1400년 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke nasceu em 1375. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mary Beardsall. Ele faleceu em 1400, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke родился в 1375 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mary Beardsall. Он умер в 1400 г. в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Biswicke nació en 1375. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mary Beardsall. Murió en 1400, a la edad de 25 años.
